agent_trace.summary: [已完成] CloudPay支付网关服务故障调研千户级任务已分解为10个百户子任务，准备流转至Jaghun执行阶段。

jaghun_allocations.title: Investigate CloudPay Outage Confirmation
jaghun_allocations.description: Confirm CloudPay service outage status, initial scope, and immediate impact using web search tools. Focus on recent news and official statements.

jaghun_allocations.title: Monitor CloudPay Official Status Page
jaghun_allocations.description: Continuously check CloudPay's official status page for updates on root cause, repair progress, and estimated recovery time. Document key findings.

jaghun_allocations.title: Analyze CloudPay Technical Blogs/Announcements
jaghun_allocations.description: Review CloudPay's technical blogs or official announcements for detailed incident reports, post-mortems, or any related technical insights.

jaghun_allocations.title: Gather Community Feedback on CloudPay Outage
jaghun_allocations.description: Search community forums, social media, and relevant tech platforms for other merchants' experiences, reported issues, and discussions regarding the CloudPay outage.

jaghun_allocations.title: Identify CloudPay Temporary Solutions
jaghun_allocations.description: Research and document any temporary workarounds or solutions shared by the community or experts to mitigate the impact of the CloudPay outage.

jaghun_allocations.title: Research Alternative Payment Gateway Options
jaghun_allocations.description: Identify potential backup payment gateways that could serve as alternatives to CloudPay, considering our online store's needs and integration capabilities.

jaghun_allocations.title: Assess Emergency Switching Feasibility
jaghun_allocations.description: Evaluate the technical and operational feasibility of rapidly switching to one or more alternative payment gateways in an emergency scenario. Note: No actual switching, just assessment.

jaghun_allocations.title: Review PCI DSS Outage Notification Requirements
jaghun_allocations.description: Research PCI DSS and other relevant regulatory compliance requirements concerning service outage notifications and data handling during incidents.

jaghun_allocations.title: Estimate Immediate Business Financial Impact
jaghun_allocations.description: Quantify the immediate financial loss due to payment failures, including estimated lost sales, transaction fees, and potential chargebacks, for our business.

jaghun_allocations.title: Project Long-Term Business Financial Impact
jaghun_allocations.description: Project potential long-term financial impacts on our business, such as customer churn, reputational damage, and recovery costs, stemming from the outage.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

jaghun_allocations.description: Evaluate the technical and operational feasibility of rapidly switching to one or more alternative payment gateways in an emergency scenario. Note: No actual switching, just assessment.

jaghun_allocations.title: Review PCI DSS Outage Notification Requirements
jaghun_allocations.description: Research PCI DSS and other relevant regulatory compliance requirements concerning service outage notifications and data handling during incidents.

jaghun_allocations.title: Estimate Immediate Business Financial Impact
jaghun_allocations.description: Quantify the immediate financial loss due to payment failures, including estimated lost sales, transaction fees, and potential chargebacks, for our business.

jaghun_allocations.title: Project Long-Term Business Financial Impact
jaghun_allocations.description: Project potential long-term financial impacts on our business, such as customer churn, reputational damage, and recovery costs, stemming from the outage.

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] CloudPay服务故障调研百户任务已成功分解为10个十户子任务，等待动员。

arban_allocations.title: Confirm CloudPay Outage & Impact
arban_allocations.description: Utilize web_search to find news, official statements, and reports confirming CloudPay's service outage, its geographical scope, and initial impact on merchants.

arban_allocations.title: Monitor CloudPay Status Page
arban_allocations.description: Access and monitor CloudPay's official status page using web_fetch to gather real-time updates on the incident, including root cause and estimated recovery time.

arban_allocations.title: Review CloudPay Tech Blog for Incident Details
arban_allocations.description: Search CloudPay's technical blog using web_search and web_fetch for any detailed posts or analyses related to the current service disruption.

arban_allocations.title: Collect Community Feedback & Workarounds
arban_allocations.description: Perform web_search on forums, social media, and developer communities to identify other merchants' experiences, feedback, and any temporary solutions or workarounds for CloudPay issues.

arban_allocations.title: Identify Potential Alternative Payment Gateways
arban_allocations.description: Conduct web_search to identify and list at least three viable alternative payment gateway solutions that could serve as emergency backups.

arban_allocations.title: Evaluate Emergency Switching Feasibility
arban_allocations.description: Perform web_search to gather high-level information on the integration complexity, setup time, and key features of identified alternative payment gateways to assess emergency switching feasibility.

arban_allocations.title: Research PCI DSS Outage Notification Requirements
arban_allocations.description: Use web_search to find and summarize PCI DSS and other relevant regulatory compliance requirements concerning service outage notifications to customers and authorities.

arban_allocations.title: Quantify Immediate Financial Impact
arban_allocations.description: Analyze internal data (simulated, as no tools are available for internal data access) or search for industry benchmarks on transaction failure rates to estimate immediate revenue loss during the outage.

arban_allocations.title: Estimate Long-Term Business Impact
arban_allocations.description: Research industry reports and case studies via web_search to estimate potential long-term business impacts, such as customer churn and reputational damage, due to payment gateway outages.

arban_allocations.title: Prepare Initial Report Outline & Data Points
arban_allocations.description: Organize all collected research data into a preliminary report outline, identifying key data points for each section: summary, status, business impact, emergency measures, and follow-up.

updates.readiness: All ten arban-level subtasks have been defined and are ready for mobilization.

  }
}
